pageContext.name: Sylvester & Tweety Bird
pageContext.description: Sufferin' Succotash!   Bring the magic of Sylvester and Tweety Bird to life with this one-of-a-kind Looney Tunes cartoon collectible. This exciting, highly-detailed sculpture is the perfect piece of Looney Tunes memorabilia to add to your collection. Produced in 1/6th scale, this statue is small enough to fit on your shelf, but big enough to appreciate all its intricate details.  Add to your collection today!
